response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use a timer and measure the time between sending the packet and receiving the response

We can also use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class to send and receive packets

We can also use the System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch class to measure the time

We can also use the System.Net.NetworkInformation.Ping class to get the round trip time

We can also use the System.Net.NetworkInformation.IPAddress class to get the server address

We can also use the System.Net.NetworkInformation.NetworkInterface class to get the network interface

We can also use the System.Net.NetworkInformation.NetworkInformation class to get the network information

We can also use the System.Net.NetworkInformation.NetworkInterfaceStatistics class to get the network interface statistics

We can also use the System.Net.NetworkInformation.NetworkInterfaceDescription class to get the network interface description
